front_page_subtitle: Your barn, Your data, Our vision
front_page_description: AI-powered open-source tools as your virtual assistant
front_page_cowcatcher_desc: A vision tool that detects mounting behavior a major indicator of cows in heat.
front_page_calfcatcher_desc: A vision tool that detects key stages of calving, from the water bag and legs to the head and the newborn calf
front_page_ai_detector_desc: The local run tool for utilizing the vision models, with a lot of personal settings for tailering to your preferences
front_page_stats_subtitle: Ensuring CowCatcherAI meets real farm needs through hands-on testing and field validation
front_page_stats_disclaimer: *We don't actually know exactly how many farms use the software since it's all locally run. This number only features the farms that actively contacted the project.
